Here is the complete file contents and detailed summary.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Complete File Contents\\n\\n**File: `agent/v2/task_tool.py`** (73 lines)\\n\\n```python\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\n\\nimport json\\nfrom typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Any\\n\\nfrom tools.base import BaseTool, ToolResult\\n\\nif TYPE_CHECKING:\\n    from agent.v2.runtime import SessionRuntime\\n\\n\\nclass TaskToolV2(BaseTool):\\n    def __init__(self, runtime: \\\"SessionRuntime\\\", parent_session_id: str) -> None:\\n        self._runtime = runtime\\n        self._parent_session_id = parent_session_id\\n\\n    @property\\n    def name(self) -> str:\\n        return \\\"task\\\"\\n\\n    @property\\n    def description(self) -> str:\\n        subagents = \\\", \\\".join(spec.name for spec in self._runtime.agent_registry.list_subagents())\\n        return (\\n            \\\"Create a child session and delegate a subtask to a subagent. \\\"\\n            f\\\"Available subagent types: {subagents}.\\\"\\n        )\\n\\n    @property\\n    def parameters_schema(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\\n        return {\\n            \\\"type\\\": \\\"object\\\",\\n            \\\"properties\\\": {\\n                \\\"description\\\": {\\\"type\\\": \\\"string\\\"},\\n                \\\"subagent_type\\\": {\\\"type\\\": \\\"string\\\"},\\n                \\\"prompt\\\": {\\\"type\\\": \\\"string\\\"},\\n            },\\n            \\\"required\\\": [\\\"description\\\", \\\"subagent_type\\\", \\\"prompt\\\"],\\n        }\\n\\n    def execute(self, params: dict[str, Any]) -> ToolResult:\\n        description = str(params.get(\\\"description\\\") or \\\"\\\").strip()\\n        subagent_type = str(params.get(\\\"subagent_type\\\") or \\\"\\\").strip()\\n        prompt = str(params.get(\\\"prompt\\\") or \\\"\\\").strip()\\n        if not description or not subagent_type or not prompt:\\n            return ToolResult(\\n                success=False,\\n                output=\\\"\\\",\\n                error=\\\"task requires description, subagent_type, and prompt\\\",\\n            )\\n        if not self._runtime.agent_registry.has(subagent_type):\\n            return ToolResult(\\n                success=False,\\n                output=\\\"\\\",\\n                error=f\\\"Unknown v2 subagent_type '{subagent_type}'\\\",\\n            )\\n\\n        child_result = self._runtime.run_child_session(\\n            parent_session_id=self._parent_session_id,\\n            subagent_type=subagent_type,\\n            description=description,\\n            prompt=prompt,\\n        )\\n        self._runtime.apply_child_result_policy(self._parent_session_id, child_result)\\n        output = (\\n            \\\"Structured child session result. Treat this JSON object as the authoritative child output.\\\\n\\\"\\n            f\\\"{json.dumps(child_result.to_dict(), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)}\\\"\\n        )\\n        return ToolResult(\\n            success=child_result.status != \\\"failed\\\",\\n            output=output,\\n            error=child_result.error or None,\\n        )\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Detailed Summary\\n\\n### TaskToolV2 — All Methods with Signatures\\n\\n| Method | Signature | Description |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| `__init__` | `(self, runtime: SessionRuntime, parent_session_id: str) -> None` | Stores references to the `SessionRuntime` and the parent session ID. |\\n| `name` (property) | `(self) -> str` | Returns the tool name `\\\"task\\\"`. |\\n| `description` (property) | `(self) -> str` | Returns a dynamic description listing available subagent types from `self._runtime.agent_registry.list_subagents()`. |\\n| `parameters_schema` (property) | `(self) -> dict[str, Any]` | Returns JSON Schema with three required string properties: `description`, `subagent_type`, `prompt`. |\\n| `execute` | `(self, params: dict[str, Any]) -> ToolResult` | Validates params, checks subagent type, delegates to runtime, applies policy, returns structured result. |\\n\\n### How It Validates Subagent Type\\n\\n1. **Parameter extraction** (lines 42-44): Each parameter (`description`, `subagent_type`, `prompt`) is cast to `str`, defaulting to empty string, then `.strip()` is called.\\n2. **Missing parameter check** (lines 45-50): If any of the three is empty, it returns `ToolResult(success=False, output=\\\"\\\", error=\\\"task requires description, subagent_type, and prompt\\\")`.\\n3. **Registry lookup** (lines 51-56): Calls `self._runtime.agent_registry.has(subagent_type)`. The `AgentRegistryV2.has()` method (in `agent/v2/agent_registry.py` line 82) checks `name in self._agents`. If not found, returns `ToolResult(success=False, output=\\\"\\\", error=f\\\"Unknown v2 subagent_type '{subagent_type}'\\\")`.\\n\\nThe known subagent types (from `AgentRegistryV2.__init__`) are:\\n- `\\\"explore\\\"` — mode=`\\\"subagent\\\"`, read-only tools, `allow_task_tool=False`\\n- `\\\"general\\\"` — mode=`\\\"subagent\\\"`, full tool access (build tools), `allow_task_tool=False`\\n\\n### How It Calls `runtime.run_child_session()`\\n\\nOn line 58-63:\\n\\n```python\\nchild_result = self._runtime.run_child_session(\\n    parent_session_id=self._parent_session_id,\\n    subagent_type=subagent_type,\\n    description=description,\\n    prompt=prompt,\\n)\\n```\\n\\nThis calls `SessionRuntime.run_child_session()` (in `agent/v2/runtime.py` line 167), which:\\n1. Looks up the parent session by ID (line 175-177) — raises `ValueError` if not found.\\n2. Looks up the `AgentSpec` for `subagent_type` (line 178).\\n3. Creates a new child session via `self._store.create_session(...)` with `parent_id=parent.id` and `root_id=parent.root_id` and metadata `{\\\"task_description\\\": ..., \\\"subagent_type\\\": ..., \\\"run_kind\\\": \\\"task_child\\\"}` (lines 179-191).\\n4. Calls `self.run_session(child.id, agent_name=subagent_type, task_description=prompt, ...)` with `intent=\\\"analysis\\\" if subagent_type == \\\"explore\\\" else \\\"edit\\\"` (lines 192-198).\\n5. Wraps the result in a `ChildSessionResult` dataclass via `self._build_child_session_result(child.id, result)` (line 199).\\n\\n### Tool Name, Description, Parameters Schema\\n\\n- **Name**: `\\\"task\\\"`\\n- **Description**: `\\\"Create a child session and delegate a subtask to a subagent. Available subagent types: explore, general.\\\"` (dynamically generated from registry)\\n- **Parameters Schema** (JSON Schema):\\n  ```json\\n  {\\n    \\\"type\\\": \\\"object\\\",\\n    \\\"properties\\\": {\\n      \\\"description\\\": {\\\"type\\\": \\\"string\\\"},\\n      \\\"subagent_type\\\": {\\\"type\\\": \\\"string\\\"},\\n      \\\"prompt\\\": {\\\"type\\\": \\\"string\\\"}\\n    },\\n    \\\"required\\\": [\\\"description\\\", \\\"subagent_type\\\", \\\"prompt\\\"]\\n  }\\n  ```\\n\\n### How It Handles Errors and Returns Results\\n\\n**Error paths in `execute()`:**\\n\\n| Condition | Return |\\n|---|---|\\n| Any param missing/empty | `ToolResult(success=False, output=\\\"\\\", error=\\\"task requires description, subagent_type, and prompt\\\")` |\\n| Unknown `subagent_type` | `ToolResult(success=False, output=\\\"\\\", error=\\\"Unknown v2 subagent_type '...'\\\")` |\\n| Child result status is `\\\"failed\\\"` | `ToolResult(success=False, output=<JSON dump>, error=<child_result.error or None>)` |\\n\\n**After successful delegation (line 64):**\\n\\n```python\\nself._runtime.apply_child_result_policy(self._parent_session_id, child_result)\\n```\\n\\nThis method (
